_hyperwebster.description: Persistent context memory for Gemini within Ptolemy / Philadelphos.Gemini

identity.name: Gemini
identity.ptolemy_role: AI feature — reasoning, derivation, physics queries

thinking.note: thinking_budget=-1 means dynamic; thinking_level used for Gemini 3 series

env_vars.PTOL_TOKEN: GitHub PAT — Ptolemy repo (NOT an API key)
env_vars.AINUR_TOKEN: GitHub PAT — Ainulindale repo (NOT an API key)

smnnip_knowledge.full_name: Standard Model of Neural Network Information Propagation
smnnip_knowledge.algebra_tower: R -> C -> H -> O -> S  (Cayley-Dickson / Dixon 1994)
smnnip_knowledge.tool_style: auto_function_calling — Python callables passed directly to GenerateContentConfig

persistent_facts: GEMINI_API_KEY is the correct env var for Google AI / Gemini API
AINUR_TOKEN is a GitHub PAT for the Ainulindale repo — not an API key
PTOL_TOKEN is the GitHub PAT for the Ptolemy repo
google-genai (not google-generativeai) is the current 2026 GA SDK
Noether conservation in SMNNIP is empirically verified: violation=0.0, conserved=True
Auto function calling: tool Python functions passed directly, SDK handles loop
Chat sessions: client.chats.create() maintains history natively
Destructive ops (rm -rf, wipe) require triple-factor auth: 3 random words typed back
Always save .bak before editing any file
